description: Curated UNDERCUT_VIABLE alerts emitted at specific replay laps when /api/v1/replay/start is called with demo_mode=true. Source: false_negatives from /api/v1/backtest (auto-derived from observed pit-cycle exchanges in the known_undercuts table). These guarantee the class demo shows >=3 alerts per race even if the live model gates suppress them. demo_source='auto_derived' is propagated to the WebSocket payload so the frontend can label the source.
